primaryOwner.name: Rachel Anderson
primaryOwner.role: Hook the Horizon publication owner and final editorial authority

operationalMaintainer.role: Hook the Horizon field intelligence operations
responsibilities: maintain sources and stable record IDs
keep current conditions, access, regulations, catch claims, and precise locations outside Hatch Match
review failed source checks and overdue records
keep the policy, log, seed register, and runtime manifest in the release package
coordinate temporary withholding and correction when needed

freshnessRules.scheduledReview: Review approved records and sources at least every 90 days.
freshnessRules.hardExpiry: Withhold a record when its hard expiry passes.
freshnessRules.sourceFailure: Move the affected record to review_required when a supporting source fails or materially changes.
freshnessRules.contradiction: Move the affected record to review_required when a credible source creates a material conflict.
freshnessRules.materialChange: Increment the record version and add a maintenance-log entry.

productionPreconditions: maintenance log is included in the release package
live readback confirms approved seed and policy versions
prohibited ownership fields and claims remain absent
